/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND ACM ICR/ACM/NTW60/LDPX:08-17-20/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON 07-23-20/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FORAN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:07-29-20/987,2/BAIL:25,000/SAORD/SA2:100 BLOCK OF HYDE ST, SF/SAORD3/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE 06-22-20 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING 07-21-20/TE:1HOUR/DOP/
/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 07-21-20 IS CONFIRMED/CONT/DOP/
